calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Alice Brown Traeg appearing for petitioner. Court questioned the delay in closing the estate. Matter granted. Counsel will submit order.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Creshon.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR 1st Account Of Former Executor
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter submitted. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
At 9:41am, Alice Brown Traeg appeared in Court. She has the response ready to file. OSC is off calendar. Accounting is continued to 12/20. She will need to re-notice her supplement. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR 1st Account Of Former Executor
Off Calendar Nov-22-2006 Continued To Dec-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. The attorney has failed to respond to the examiner's notes. OSC will be issued to attorney. Return date is 11/22. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Continued To Oct-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Continued To Sep-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Final Account By Mrs. Gupta
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Alice Brown Traeg appearing for former administrator. She has filed the accounting and it is set for hearing on 8/7. OSC is off calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Final Account By Mrs. Gupta
Off Calendar May-24-2006 Continued To Jul-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Counsel has failed to file an accounting for her former client. OSC to be issued to Alice Brown Traeg. Return date is 7/5. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Kenny Lewis.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Final Account By Mrs. Gupta
Off Calendar May-10-2006 Continued To May-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Alice Brown Traeg appearing for the estate. Counsel appeared to request for continuance to file the final account by Mrs. Gupta. Matter is continued to 5/24. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Final Account By Mrs. Gupta
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Continued To May-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Alice Brown Traeg appearing for proposed executor and also as attorney for former executor. Notice was given to Mrs. Gupta's conservator and as her attorney, counsel waives notice. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Court is setting a status date on 4/26 for filing of final account by Mrs. Gupta. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
